description: D365 Finance & Operations MCP Server - OData entity access, metadata, reports, and environment management for D365 F&O.
capabilities: Get entity schemas with property details and labels

authentication.method: Azure Default Credentials or Service Principal
authentication.notes: Uses Azure Identity SDK. Authenticate via `az login` or configure service principal.

prerequisites: Azure CLI authenticated OR service principal configured
App registration in Entra ID with D365FO API permissions
setup.install: uvx handles installation automatically on first run
